creator: bethduerden@msn.com
text: I cannot download security updates.  I cannot email or download any files.  My laptop will not allow access to create folders.  I am very concerned that my computer has been corrupted.  Since I cannot email from this computer, this was the only thing I could think of.  I use linksys wireless.  I can access my email from my work PC, so if you would please email me and tell me what I should do I would be incredibly grateful.
